{{Infobox construct
| name = Sage’s Remnant
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage’s Remnant]] was used in the creation of [[Suu]]'s bow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage’s Remnant]] is a regenerating skeleton that can write on a board.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] is a being that can bond with others.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]]'s only inheritance is the [[Sage’s Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
